expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run states the focus is "Not demonstrated / cannot be verified from provided evidence" and that the available requirement text "does not explicitly encode label visibility rules, density limits, [or] overlap-sensitive behavior". It also notes missing Phase 1 artifacts (e.g., "no Phase 1 artifacts are provided"), so explicit coverage of these assumptions is not shown.
